evals.prompt: Check my NVDA bull put spread: I sold the $155 put and bought the $140 put for $1.98 credit, expires May 1 2026.
evals.expected_output: A status card showing SAFE ZONE (NVDA is currently ~$172, giving ~10% buffer above the $155 short strike). Should show buffer%, current P&L, loss% of max, cost to close, and 'let theta work' guidance.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box status card with SPREAD MONITOR header

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones: SAFE, WATCH, WARNING, DANGER, or ACT NOW

assertions.name: safe_zone_for_nvda
assertions.description: Response classifies NVDA spread as SAFE ZONE given stock is ~10% above the $155 short strike

assertions.name: shows_buffer_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the percentage buffer between current stock price and the short strike

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L per contract (dollar amount) and loss% of max loss

assertions.name: actionable_guidance
assertions.description: Response provides zone-appropriate guidance (for SAFE: no action needed, let theta work)

evals.prompt: How is my Citigroup spread doing? I have a $99/$93 put spread on C, collected $1.14 credit, expires May 1 2026. Should I be worried about the earnings?
evals.expected_output: Status card for C spread. C is at ~$109.52, giving ~9.6% buffer above $99 short strike — likely SAFE or WATCH. Should flag the April 14 earnings as a risk factor within the expiry window, even though the buffer looks comfortable. Cost to close and P&L should be shown.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box status card

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones

assertions.name: flags_earnings_risk
assertions.description: Response mentions the Citigroup earnings event (~April 14 2026) as a risk factor for this position

assertions.name: shows_buffer_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the % buffer between current stock price and the $99 short strike

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L and cost to close the spread

assertions.name: actionable_guidance
assertions.description: Response gives a concrete suggestion — either hold with awareness of earnings or close/roll before April 14

evals.prompt: Check my AAPL spread status — sold the $185 put, bought the $170 put, got $2.10 credit, expires May 1 2026.
evals.expected_output: Status card for AAPL. AAPL is currently around $220+, giving a very large buffer (>15%) above the $185 short strike. Should be SAFE ZONE with strong theta decay in the trader's favor. P&L should show significant profit already accrued.

assertions.name: status_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box status card

assertions.name: zone_classified
assertions.description: Response clearly states one of the five zones

assertions.name: safe_zone_for_aapl
assertions.description: Response classifies as SAFE ZONE given the large buffer between AAPL price and $185 short strike

assertions.name: shows_buffer_pct
assertions.description: Response shows the percentage buffer — should be notably large (>10%)

assertions.name: shows_pnl
assertions.description: Response shows current P&L, which should be positive (profit) given the comfortable buffer

assertions.name: actionable_guidance
assertions.description: Response gives zone-appropriate guidance for a healthy SAFE ZONE position
